name: hug/mail-cockpit
description: Manual e-mail cockpit for the Shopware 6.7 admin – compose free e-mails from order/customer detail, mail history tab, send documents by mail, template preview with real order data

suggest.frosh/mail-platform-archive: Enables the mail history tab (F2). Version >= 3.6 required (order_id and mail_template_id columns on frosh_mail_archive).

description.de-DE: Manueller E-Mail-Versand aus der Administration: freie E-Mails aus Bestell- und Kundendetail, Mail-Historie, Dokumentversand per E-Mail und Template-Vorschau mit echten Bestelldaten.
description.en-GB: Manual e-mail dispatch from the administration: free e-mails from order and customer detail, mail history, sending documents by e-mail and template preview with real order data.
